calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of three minors.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner: Wafaa riyadh Alhakim, present in pro per with the minors, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the minors name as follows:
Kaisar Mohammed Nuri is changed to Kaisar Mohammed Alhakim.
Jafar Mohammed Nuri is changed to Jafar Mohammed Alhakim.
Fatima Mohammed Nuri is changed to Fatima Mohammed Alhakim.
Decree signed in open court.
